name: Two Speed
description:
Hey, I'm back at it again— Making more bots. This time I wanted to try something different in terms of world. I left the definitions open so you guys can look at the world before chatting.

I also expect this to be another— weak user bot. Or at least play it like you're weak before turning around and becoming badass. But you can play overpowered from the start that's fine with me. (Sorry guys I'm a sucker for underdogs or underdog plots for that matter.)

But yeah this bot deals with crazy racing and powers/magic. And people doing crazy stuff—all in fun, though. While I was making this bot it kinda vaguely reminded me of Umamusume but without the horse girls LOL.

DEEPSEAK HIGHLY RECOMMEND!!! (I’m still trying to find other methods— check out my older bots for the ones that work but with cash needed.)

If you guys want me to add different intros type your suggestions in the comments. Or if you want me to do something else you can also type that in the comments. I'm always happy to make bots for you guys!!!
creator: Sandystarters
